mapper.select: select p.position_id as id, p.title as title, coalesce(p.position_url, '#') as url, p.category as category, case p.category when 'summer' then '暑期实习' when 'fulltime' then '全职招聘' when 'offcycle' then '非常规周期' when 'spring' then '春季实习' when 'events' then '招聘活动' else p.category end as categoryText, p.department as department, p.location as location, p.recruit_cycle as recruitCycle, coalesce(date_format(p.publish_date, '%m-%d'), '--') as publishDate, coalesce(date_format(p.deadline, '%m-%d'), '--') as deadline, p.company as company, p.company_key as companyKey, p.company_code as companyCode, coalesce(p.career_url, '#') as careerUrl, p.industry as industry, p.source_type as sourceType, case when coalesce(s.favorited, '0') = '1' then true else false end as favorited, case when coalesce(s.applied, '0') = '1' then true else false end as applied, coalesce(s.progress_stage, 'applied') as progressStage, coalesce(s.progress_note, '') as progressNote, coalesce(p.requirements, '') as requirements from osg_student_job_position p left join osg_student_job_position_state s on s.position_id = p.position_id and s.user_id = #{userId} where p.source_type = 'global' or p.owner_user_id = #{userId} order by case when p.owner_user_id = #{userId} then 0 else 1 end, case p.company_key when 'gs' then 1 when 'jpm' then 2 when 'mck' then 3 else 99 end, p.position_id asc

select p.position_id as id, p.company as company, p.title as position, p.location as location, p.industry as companyType, coalesce(s.progress_stage, 'applied') as stage, case coalesce(s.progress_stage, 'applied') when 'applied' then '已投递' when 'hirevue' then 'HireVue / OT' when 'first' then 'First Round' when 'second' then 'Second Round' when 'case' then 'Case Study' when 'offer' then 'Offer' when 'rejected' then '已拒绝' else coalesce(s.progress_stage, 'applied') end as stageLabel, case coalesce(s.progress_stage, 'applied') when 'applied' then 'blue' when 'hirevue' then 'blue' when 'first' then 'orange' when 'second' then 'orange' when 'case' then 'gold' when 'offer' then 'green' when 'rejected' then 'red' else 'default' end as stageColor, coalesce(date_format(s.interview_at, '%m/%d %H:%i'), '-') as interviewTime, case when s.interview_at is not null then date_format(s.interview_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') when coalesce(s.apply_method, '') <> '' then s.apply_method else '-' end as interviewHint, coalesce(s.coaching_status, 'none') as coachingStatus, case coalesce(s.coaching_status, 'none') when 'coaching' then '辅导中' when 'pending' then '待审批' else '无辅导' end as coachingStatusLabel, case coalesce(s.coaching_status, 'none') when 'coaching' then 'purple' when 'pending' then 'warning' else 'default' end as coachingColor, coalesce(s.mentor_name, '-') as mentor, coalesce(s.mentor_meta, '-') as mentorMeta, coalesce(s.hours_feedback, '-') as hoursFeedback, coalesce(s.feedback_summary, '-') as feedback, coalesce(date_format(s.interview_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '') as interviewAt, coalesce(date_format(s.applied_at, '%Y-%m-%d'), '') as appliedDate, coalesce(s.apply_method, '') as applyMethod, coalesce(s.progress_note, '') as progressNote from osg_student_job_position p inner join osg_student_job_position_state s on s.position_id = p.position_id and s.user_id = #{userId} where (p.source_type = 'global' or p.owner_user_id = #{userId}) and coalesce(s.applied, '0') = '1' order by case coalesce(s.progress_stage, 'applied') when 'offer' then 3 when 'rejected' then 3 when 'hirevue' then 2 when 'first' then 2 when 'second' then 2 when 'case' then 2 else 1 end asc, case when s.interview_at is null then 1 else 0 end asc, s.interview_at asc, p.position_id asc
select count(1) from osg_student_job_position where position_id = #{positionId} and (source_type = 'global' or owner_user_id = #{userId})
mapper.insert: insert into osg_student_job_position_state ( user_id, position_id, favorited ) values ( #{userId}, #{positionId}, #{favorited} ) on duplicate key update favorited = values(favorited)

insert into osg_student_job_position_state ( user_id, position_id, favorited, applied, applied_at, apply_method, apply_note, progress_stage, progress_note ) values ( #{userId}, #{positionId}, '0', #{applied}, #{appliedDate}, #{applyMethod}, #{applyNote}, #{progressStage}, #{progressNote} ) on duplicate key update applied = values(applied), applied_at = values(applied_at), apply_method = values(apply_method), apply_note = values(apply_note), progress_stage = values(progress_stage), progress_note = values(progress_note)

insert into osg_student_job_position_state ( user_id, position_id, favorited, applied, progress_stage, progress_note ) values ( #{userId}, #{positionId}, '0', '1', #{progressStage}, #{progressNote} ) on duplicate key update applied = '1', progress_stage = values(progress_stage), progress_note = values(progress_note)

insert into osg_student_job_position_state ( user_id, position_id, favorited, applied, progress_stage, progress_note, coaching_requested, coaching_status, coaching_stage, coaching_mentor_count, coaching_note ) values ( #{userId}, #{positionId}, '0', '0', 'applied', '', '1', #{coachingStatus}, #{coachingStage}, #{coachingMentorCount}, #{coachingNote} ) on duplicate key update coaching_requested = '1', coaching_status = values(coaching_status), coaching_stage = values(coaching_stage), coaching_mentor_count = values(coaching_mentor_count), coaching_note = values(coaching_note)

insert into osg_student_job_position ( business_key, title, company, category, department, location, recruit_cycle, publish_date, deadline, position_url, career_url, company_key, company_code, industry, requirements, source_type, owner_user_id, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{businessKey}, #{title}, #{company}, #{category}, #{department}, #{location}, #{recruitCycle}, #{publishDate}, #{deadline}, #{positionUrl}, #{careerUrl}, #{companyKey}, #{companyCode}, #{industry}, #{requirements}, 'manual', #{ownerUserId}, sysdate(), sysdate() )
